# V57 Complete Route Recovery and Institutional Experience Command

This release restores complete route visibility across the public website. It preserves all previously built pages and adds a static-first Complete Route Index.

Canonical route count: 63.

## Reinstated into navigation

- Loop Contract Theatre.
- Evidence Room at `evidence/index.html`.
- Complete Route Index.

## Assurance

Public demos remain browser-local, default-deny, wallet-free, analytics-free, cookie-free, storage-free, and user-data-free.
